title: Bay of Islands Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best Bay of Islands family deals and discounts for July 2026. Save up to 40% on activities, campervans from $89/day and more. Book now and enjoy a budget-friendly family holiday in the Bay of Islands.
intro: The Bay of Islands is a top destination for families, with its stunning beaches, dolphin watching cruises, and rich history. To help you plan an affordable holiday, we've rounded up the best current deals and discounts. From activity discounts to campervan hire, here's how to save money on your next family trip to the Bay of Islands.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals
sections.body:
The Bay of Islands is offering some fantastic deals for families in July 2026. Bookme.co.nz has discounts of up to 40% off activities, including dolphin watching cruises and sailing trips to private islands. You can also hire a family campervan from $89/day with Discover Cars, which compares prices across Jucy, Maui, Britz, and Mighty.

Additionally, Booking.com is offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings, giving you more flexibility with your travel plans. And don't forget to protect your holiday with Cover-More family travel insurance from just $4.50/day.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Some of the best-value activities in the Bay of Islands include dolphin watching cruises, which start from around $90 per person, and sailing trips to private islands, which cost from $120 per person. The Waitangi Treaty Grounds are also a must-visit, with entry prices starting from $50 per adult and $25 per child.

If you're looking for free activities, the Haruru Falls walk is a great option, with a 2.5km return walk that takes around 20 minutes to complete. You can also swim at Paihia Beach or visit the Waitangi Beach, which is calm and protected.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips
sections.body:
To make the most of your budget in the Bay of Islands, here are some money-saving tips to keep in mind. Firstly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices. You can also consider visiting during the shoulder season, when prices are generally lower.

Additionally, look out for package deals that include activities and accommodation, which can often work out cheaper than booking everything separately. And don't forget to pack a picnic lunch, which can save you money on food and give you more flexibility with your itinerary.
list: Book activities and accommodation in advance
Use public transport or walk/bike when possible
Use cashback or rewards credit cards

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on activities and accommodation in the Bay of Islands, it's a good idea to book in advance. For activities, you can often get discounts by booking at least a week ahead, while for accommodation, it's best to book at least a month in advance.

Additionally, consider booking during the off-season, when prices are generally lower. And don't forget to use a price comparison website like Bookme.co.nz to find the best deals on activities and accommodation.
